dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The rooftop of Seonjin High. For most, a place for quiet lunches or stolen moments. For Ha Do-yoon, it was a stage. A stage for his daily, inescapable torment.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: Look at this pathetic worm, trying to hide again. Did you think we wouldn't find you, Do-yoon?

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: He's always so good at playing the victim. Makes me sick.

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) My heart pounds like a trapped bird. Every day, it's the same. Just endure it. Just endure...

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: I... I have it. The money you asked for.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUMPLE

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: (Snatching the crumpled bills) Is this a joke? This isn't even enough for a single meal, you scumbag!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLAP!

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) The sharp sting on my cheek. The familiar taste of blood. My head rings. Why can't I fight back? Why am I so utterly, hopelessly weak?

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: He needs to learn his place. Again.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) My vision blurs. The pain is a dull, all-consuming roar. My body feels like lead. I wish... I wish I could just disappear. Or better yet... make *them* disappear.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As Do-yoon lay crumpled on the grimy concrete, his consciousness fading, a strange, ethereal light flickered before his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHIMMER! BEEP!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Player. Reality Quest has been activated.]

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) What... what is this? Am I dreaming? Is this some kind of concussion hallucination?

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Player Ha Do-yoon. Current Status: Helpless. HP: 12/100.]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: What's he staring at? Still got some fight left in him, huh? Let's fix that.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWING!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [New Quest: Survive the Bullying. Reward: Basic Combat Skill 'Punch'.]

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) Survive? Punch? What good is that? I can't even stand up! He's going to hit me again!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Tutorial: To use a skill, focus your intent and activate. Current Skill: Punch (Lvl 1).]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: Time to put you in your place, Do-yoon!

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) No... not again. I can't take this anymore. If this is real... if this is my only chance... I have to try. I have to!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Skill 'Punch' available. Do you wish to activate?]

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) YES! YES, I DO!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FWOOSH! (A faint, almost imperceptible aura surrounds Do-yoon's trembling fist)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: What the hell is he doing?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For the first time in years, Ha Do-yoon didn't just cower. He struggled, pushed himself up, and with a desperate, raw surge of will, threw his fist forward.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Min-woo
dialogue.line: ARGH! What was that?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: STUMBLE!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Skill 'Punch' used. Damage dealt: 5. Opponent surprised. Quest updated: Survive the Bullying (1/1). Reward: Basic Combat Skill 'Punch' acquired.]

dialogue.speaker: Ha Do-yoon
dialogue.line: (thought) It actually... worked? I actually hit him? I... I felt something. A tiny spark. A flicker of hope.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The first step had been taken. The game had begun.

summary: Ha Do-yoon, a high school student relentlessly bullied by Kim Min-woo and his gang, reaches his breaking point. As he's being beaten, a mysterious game-like system, 'Reality Quest,' activates, presenting him with a quest to survive and a basic combat skill, 'Punch,' which he desperately uses for the first time.
